issues.message: Mart model dimproduct.sql imports bronze.product directly via source() instead of ref('stg_dimproduct')
Model filename 'dimproduct' is not snake_case — missing underscore separator; should be 'dim_product'
_dbt_run_id = {{ invocation_id }} is not present in the mart model final CTE
_loaded_at = current_timestamp() is not present in the mart model; required for table materialization
Column references SellEndDate and DiscontinuedDate inside the CASE expression use PascalCase; all field names must be lowercase
No schema YAML file exists for the mart model dbt/models/marts/dimproduct.sql; version: 2 header required
No mart schema YAML file; model description field is missing
stg_dimproduct.sql uses materialized='table'; staging models must be materialized as ephemeral
stg_dimproduct.sql contains business logic (CASE WHEN Status derivation, COALESCE Color normalization); business logic must live in the mart model, not staging
Final CTE in dimproduct.sql selects only 6 of 12 non-identity target columns; missing: size, product_line, class, style, start_date (SellStartDate), end_date (SellEndDate)
Mart model references ProductAlternateKey in cast(ProductAlternateKey as nvarchar(25)), but bronze.Product has no ProductAlternateKey column; the proc derives it via CAST(ProductID AS NVARCHAR(25))

feedback_for_model_generator.message: Replace {{ source('bronze', 'product') }} in dimproduct.sql with {{ ref('stg_dimproduct') }}; mart models must reference staging via ref(), not source() directly
Add the 6 missing target columns to the final CTE: size, product_line, class, style, start_date, end_date
Replace cast(ProductAlternateKey as nvarchar(25)) with cast(product_id as nvarchar(25)) as product_alternate_key; ProductAlternateKey does not exist in bronze.Product
Rename mart model file from dimproduct.sql to dim_product.sql (snake_case requires underscore between 'dim' and 'product')
Add _dbt_run_id = {{ invocation_id }} to the final CTE
Add _loaded_at = current_timestamp() to the final CTE; required for table materialization
Lowercase all field references in the CASE expression: SellEndDate → sell_end_date, DiscontinuedDate → discontinued_date
Create dbt/models/marts/_dim_product.yml with version: 2 at the top, a model description, and column definitions including primary key
Change stg_dimproduct.sql config to materialized='ephemeral'; staging models must not be table-materialized
Move business logic (CASE WHEN Status, COALESCE Color) out of stg_dimproduct.sql and into the mart model; staging is limited to field renaming, casting, and light standardization
